releaseNotes:
Release v0.6.0

New Features:
- Integrated terminal panel with xterm.js, PTY backend, multi-tab support, and collapsible UI
- IDE file tree and Monaco text editor (#71)

Bug Fixes:
- Fix output edge offset for nodes with exposed parameters (PS-124, #73)
- Fix poisoned-mutex handling, root-path edge case, and tab counter reset
- Fix terminal output listener attached before backend shell spawn
- Fix bug reporting, console bugs, and terminal bugs

Improvements:
- Unified scrollbar appearance across terminal, file editor, and right sidebar
- Proper shortcut routing for the IDE work area
- Redesigned update notification banner and modal
